mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( post_code, creator_user_id, title, content, author_name, author_handle, topic_name, audience_type, display_time, like_count, comment_count, save_count, accent_tone, badge, image_url, anonymous_flag, location, created_at ) VALUES ( #{postCode}, #{creatorUserId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{authorName}, #{authorHandle}, #{topicName}, #{audienceType}, #{displayTime}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{saveCount}, #{accentTone}, #{badge}, #{imageUrl}, #{anonymousFlag}, #{location}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.post_code, p.creator_user_id, p.title, p.content, p.author_name, p.author_handle, p.topic_name, p.audience_type, p.display_time, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.save_count, p.accent_tone, p.badge, p.image_url, p.anonymous_flag, p.location, p.created_at, COALESCE(i.liked, 0) AS liked, COALESCE(i.saved, 0) AS saved FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_interactions i ON i.post_id = p.id AND i.user_id = #{userId} WHERE p.post_code = #{postCode}
SELECT post_id, user_id, liked, saved FROM post_interactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = (SELECT id FROM posts WHERE post_code = #{postCode})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_interactions (user_id, post_id, liked, saved, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId}, #{liked}, #{saved}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT contact_id, user_id, followed FROM user_follow_contacts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND contact_id = (SELECT id FROM alumni_contacts WHERE contact_code = #{contactCode})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follow_contacts (user_id, contact_id, followed, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{contactId}, #{followed}, NOW())

INSERT INTO messages (message_code, conversation_id, sender_type, text_content, display_time, created_at) VALUES (#{messageCode}, #{conversationId}, #{senderType}, #{textContent}, #{displayTime}, #{createdAt})
